_meta.principle: Verified milestones with sources. No speculation.

milestones.title: Baba Sehgal · Thanda Thanda Pani
milestones.blurb: First major Hindi rap hit. The grandfather clock starts ticking on DHH.

milestones.title: Bohemia · Vich Pardesan De
milestones.blurb: Bohemia's debut. Punjabi rap finds its first global voice from the Bay Area.

milestones.title: Bohemia · Pesa Nasha Pyar
milestones.blurb: Released through Universal India. Cements Punjabi rap on the Indian charts.

milestones.title: Yo Yo Honey Singh · International Villager
milestones.blurb: Mainstream breakthrough. Bollywood notices rap can sell.

milestones.title: Mafia Mundeer breaks up
milestones.blurb: Raftaar, Badshah, Ikka, Lil Golu split from Honey Singh's camp. The mainstream goes multi-polar.

milestones.title: Divine · Yeh Mera Bombay
milestones.blurb: Gully Gang's spark. Andheri-Mumbai rap goes audible nationally.

milestones.title: Naezy · Aafat!
milestones.blurb: Kurla's outburst. The street-tape mythology of gully rap begins.

milestones.title: Azadi Records founded
milestones.blurb: Mo Joshi + Uday Kapur build the conscious-wave label. Prabh Deep, Ahmer, Seedhe Maut will all pass through.

milestones.title: Divine + Naezy · Mere Gully Mein
milestones.blurb: The track that became a movement. Cited by Zoya Akhtar as the seed for Gully Boy.

milestones.title: Prabh Deep · Class-Sikh
milestones.blurb: The first conscious-wave album with mainstream press coverage. Azadi's flag goes up.

milestones.title: Gully Boy releases
milestones.blurb: Zoya Akhtar's film puts Divine + Naezy archetypes on global screens. DHH crosses over for good.

milestones.title: Sidhu Moose Wala · 295
milestones.blurb: Punjabi rap's defining anthem of the era. Streams that hadn't been seen before in the language.

milestones.title: Seedhe Maut · NAYAAB
milestones.blurb: Encore ABJ and Calm deliver Delhi's lyrical opus. Lunch Break, Shaktimaan, all from this run.

milestones.title: KR$NA vs Emiway
milestones.blurb: The biggest DHH beef ever. Untitled, F.U., No Cap. Tens of millions of views.

milestones.title: MC Stan wins Bigg Boss 16
milestones.blurb: The Pune trapper goes mainstream household. Insaan, Tadipaar streams explode.

milestones.title: Sidhu Moose Wala killed · 29 May
milestones.blurb: 29 years old. The genre loses its loudest voice. The Last Ride drops posthumously.

milestones.title: Seedhe Maut leave Azadi · launch DL91
milestones.blurb: Encore + Calm go independent. Lunch Break, Hyped, the post-Azadi run begins.

milestones.title: Hanumankind · Big Dawgs goes global
milestones.blurb: The Bengaluru via Houston via Kerala MC posts the first DHH track to crack global virality on Spotify-scale. The world finally notices.

milestones.title: Karan Aujla · Tauba Tauba
milestones.blurb: Punjabi rap's biggest crossover in years. Bollywood, Spotify, the whole stack.

milestones.title: Yashraj · Bombay Coast
milestones.blurb: Mumbai's lyrical heir delivers a new-wave manifesto. The pen torch passes.

milestones.title: Hanumankind · Monsoon Season EP
milestones.blurb: Def Jam India / Capitol release. The first major-label DHH album rollout with global press.

milestones.title: Rep launches
milestones.blurb: 90 artists. 10 cities. One platform. Ranked by the heads.
